biological_replicate: we use a Galleria mellonella larvae infection model
experimental_design: we observed that DEGs manifested in eumycetoma grain development stage-specific expression
number_of_fractions: LC-MS/MS analysis of M. mycetomatis cultured under iron-limiting conditions revealed the presence of 1,099 mycelial proteins
number_of_biological_replicates: default value as no total number of biological replicates is specified
number_of_samples: Since the number of biological replicates is 1 and fractions are 1, total samples = 1
